title: E7805 NEBNextÂź Ultraâą II FS DNA Library Prep Kit for IlluminaÂź Protocol to use with Inputs â„ 100 ng (Chapter 2)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"33igt","text":"The NEBNext Ultra II FS DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina contains the enzymes and buffers required to convert a broad range of input amounts of DNA into high quality libraries for next-generation sequencing on the Illumina platform. The fast, user-friendly workflow also has minimal hands-on time.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1vn75","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"68vph","text":"Note: The Ultra II FS Kit is not compatible with bisulfite conversion workflows.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":80}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"89bfh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"elqdo","text":"Each kit component must pass rigorous quality control standards, and for each new lot the entire set of reagents is functionally validated together by construction and sequencing of indexed libraries on an Illumina sequencing platform.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cskoi","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1236u","text":"For larger volume requirements, customized and bulk packaging is available by purchasing through the OEM/Bulks department at NEB. Please contact OEM@neb.com for further information.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"18lh9","text":"Note: Follow this protocol for inputs â„ 100 ng and size selection for inserts up to 550 bp. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a8frj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9fdht","text":"Follow the protocol in Chapter 1 for inputs â€ 100 ng, as size selection is not recommended for this input range. https://www.protocols.io/view/e7805-nebnext-ultra-ii-fs-dna-library-prep-kit-for-14egnypmv5dy/v2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":113,"length":96}],"data":{}},{"key":"deeh0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c1t7p","text":"Follow the protocol in Chapter 3 for inputs â„ 100 ng and fragment sizes \u003e 550 bp. https://www.protocols.io/view/e7805-nebnext-ultra-ii-fs-dna-library-prep-kit-for-n2idgce","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":82,"length":88}],"data":{}},{"key":"4nq48","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"docn0","text":"For 100 ng inputs, either the no size selection protocol (Chapter 1) or a size selection protocol (Chapter 2 or 3) can be followed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"48v5a","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"efttl","text":"Starting Material: 100â500 ng purified, genomic DNA. We recommend that the DNA be in 1X TE (10 mM Tris pH 8.0, 1 mM EDTA), however, 10 mM Tris pH 7.5â8, low EDTA TE or H2O are also acceptable. If the input DNA is less than 26 ÎŒl, add TE (provided) to a final volume of 26 ÎŒl.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18},{"style":"sub","offset":169,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"4E0F16AC15DD11EE8F810A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/e7805-nebnext-ultra-ii-fs-dna-library-prep-kit-for-14egnypmv5dy/v2"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"4ED7F8BC5FE211EB8D150A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/e7805-nebnext-ultra-ii-fs-dna-library-prep-kit-for-n2idgce"}}}}
